response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the intended songs 'Android Girl' and 'Haikei Doppelganger' as identified in the scene context. The provided JSON reference was partial, so I relied on on-screen text and high-fidelity audio transcription to ensure full coverage of the 5-minute performance, including the mid-clip dialogue segment. Subtitles are tightly aligned to vocal audio and split according to natural pauses to ensure accuracy and readability.

subtitles.original: 君だけのものになった僕が好きなの？
subtitles.english: Do you like me now that I've become yours alone?

subtitles.original: ずっと ずっと 騙してきたんだね
subtitles.english: You've been deceiving me for so, so long, haven't you?

subtitles.original: アンドロイドガール
subtitles.english: Android Girl

subtitles.original: 想いは何だっけ？
subtitles.english: What were my feelings again?

subtitles.original: 錆びついた腕で何度僕を求めた？
subtitles.english: How many times did you reach for me with those rusted arms?

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: Always...

subtitles.original: ずっと
subtitles.english: Always...

subtitles.original: 何千回愛を再起動して
subtitles.english: How many thousands of times will you reboot love?

subtitles.original: ちょっとだって変われやしないや
subtitles.english: It won't change even a little bit.

subtitles.original: 何千回愛を再起動して
subtitles.english: How many thousands of times will you reboot love?

subtitles.original: ちょっとだって変われやしないや
subtitles.english: It won't change even a little bit!

subtitles.original: ホロライブでラプラスさんの影が薄いというお話なんですが
subtitles.english: There's a story that your presence in Hololive is quite weak...

subtitles.original: いや、納得できないね
subtitles.english: No, I can't accept that.

subtitles.original: Q. ラプラスさんの魅力は？
subtitles.english: Q. What is your charm?

subtitles.original: ないんだな、それが
subtitles.english: Actually, there isn't any!

subtitles.original: どうもこんにちは 君の分身です
subtitles.english: Hello there, I'm your alter ego.

subtitles.original: 何の冗談か 眼を擦ってみる
subtitles.english: Thinking it's some kind of joke, I rub my eyes.

subtitles.original: 影が二つ伸びて
subtitles.english: Two shadows stretch out...

subtitles.original: そしてまた幕は上がる
subtitles.english: ...and the curtain rises once again.

subtitles.original: もう一人自分がいたらなんて あなたは言いました
subtitles.english: "If only there was another me," you once said.

subtitles.original: そんな真摯な願いが 僕を呼んだのさ
subtitles.english: That sincere wish of yours is what called me here.

subtitles.original: そりゃ願ったとも
subtitles.english: Of course I wished for it!

subtitles.original: 悲しく全ての英才(エイジェイ)
subtitles.english: Miserably, all the gifted ones...

subtitles.original: 暇は無いから 拙速 殺生 意味など無いなら退場
subtitles.english: No time to waste, quick kill, if there's no meaning, then leave!

subtitles.original: ねえ こんな事より大事な事があるんだよ いいだろ？
subtitles.english: Hey, there's something more important than this, okay?

subtitles.original: ええ やります やります 何でもやります 僕はお前の分身です
subtitles.english: Yes, I'll do it, I'll do it, I'll do anything, I'm your alter ego.

subtitles.original: 終末(スリーマライ)で 冥想(メサイア)は You?
subtitles.english: In the end, is the Messiah you?

subtitles.original: 拝啓ドッペルゲンガー 君は 君は誰？
subtitles.english: Dear Doppelganger, who are you? Who are you?

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 混濁を指して 僕は誰？
subtitles.english: Ah, pointing to the confusion, who am I?

subtitles.original: ねえ 有りもしないけど 独り 醒めぬ夢
subtitles.english: Hey, it's not real, but it's a dream I can't wake from.

subtitles.original: 奪い去ってしまえよ さよなら
subtitles.english: Just take it all away... Farewell.

subtitles.original: 拝啓ドッペルゲンガー 誰は 誰は君？
subtitles.english: Dear Doppelganger, who is you? Who is you?

subtitles.original: 蝕まれた存在に きっと気付かないね
subtitles.english: You probably won't notice your eroded existence.

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まない 冷め止まない 奇跡の輪廻が狂った
subtitles.english: The never-ending, never-cooling cycle of miracles has gone mad.

subtitles.original: 世界を染め上げろ パッパッパ
subtitles.english: Dye the world, pa-pa-pa!

subtitles.original: どうも様子がおかしい月曜日
subtitles.english: Something seems off this Monday.

subtitles.original: 一つ 二つと 崩れゆく辻褄が
subtitles.english: One by one, the consistency crumbles...

subtitles.original: 僕を再送(サイキ)する
subtitles.english: ...and retransmits me.

subtitles.original: 「お前は一体誰だ」と
subtitles.english: Asking, "Who on earth are you?"

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って 知らない火の粉も知らない言葉
subtitles.english: Wait a minute, sparks I don't know, words I don't know...

subtitles.original: そりゃいつの間にやら 影は解けていく
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, the shadow was dissolving.

subtitles.original: 僕はなんだろう
subtitles.english: What am I?

subtitles.original: ねえ どこか存在を返して
subtitles.english: Hey, give me back my existence somewhere!

subtitles.original: 相対様々 決定 肯定 恍惚を 毒を頂戴
subtitles.english: Relative various, decide, affirm, ecstasy, give me poison!

subtitles.original: もう居場所はここに無い事分かってるんでしょう
subtitles.english: You know there's no place for you here anymore, right?

subtitles.original: ねえ 奪われたんなら 奪い返せばいいだろう
subtitles.english: Hey, if it was stolen, just steal it back!

subtitles.original: 今度は僕の番だ
subtitles.english: Now it's my turn.

subtitles.original: 終末(スリーマライ)で 侵略(インベーダー)は You?
subtitles.english: In the end, is the Invader you?

subtitles.original: 拝啓ドッペルゲンガー 君は 君は誰？
subtitles.english: Dear Doppelganger, who are you? Who are you?

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 混濁を指して 僕は誰？
subtitles.english: Ah, pointing to the confusion, who am I?

subtitles.original: 待て それは僕の手だ 命の椅子は一つだけ
subtitles.english: Wait, that's my hand! There's only one seat for life.

subtitles.original: 拝啓ドッペルゲンガー 誰は 誰は君？
subtitles.english: Dear Doppelganger, who is you? Who is you?

subtitles.original: 転げ落ちた一粒 今日は焼き果てる前に
subtitles.english: One grain that rolled off, today before it burns out...

subtitles.original: 誰でもいい 何でもいい 器をください
subtitles.english: Anyone is fine, anything is fine, give me a vessel!

subtitles.original: 狂った世界が染め上げた パッパッパ
subtitles.english: The mad world has dyed it, pa-pa-pa!

subtitles.original: それはずっと続く人の煩悩さ
subtitles.english: That's the ever-continuing human worldly desire.

subtitles.original: 乱れ合って 慈しみ合っても されど
subtitles.english: Mixing together, loving each other, and yet...

subtitles.original: 欠けたピース 昔の天気予報 また 愛を
subtitles.english: A missing piece, an old weather forecast, love again...

subtitles.original: 騙し合って 生まれ変わる いにしえを
subtitles.english: Deceiving each other, reborn from ancient times...

subtitles.original: 僕の方が ちゃんと君を生きてやるから
subtitles.english: Because I'll live your life better than you...

subtitles.original: 君も次の誰か ちゃんと座らなくちゃ
subtitles.english: You must also seat the next person properly.

subtitles.original: もう分かってんだろう 何をすればいいかさ
subtitles.english: You already know what you have to do.

subtitles.original: どうか 誰か僕に 奇跡をくれ
subtitles.english: Please, someone give me a miracle!

subtitles.original: 拝啓ドッペルゲンガー 君は 君は誰？
subtitles.english: Dear Doppelganger, who are you? Who are you?

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 混濁を指して 僕は誰？
subtitles.english: Ah, pointing to the confusion, who am I?

subtitles.original: もう止まらない 戻れない どうもこんにちは 君の
subtitles.english: Can't stop, can't go back... Hello there, I am your...

subtitles.original: 拝啓ドッペルゲンガー それは それは僕
subtitles.english: Dear Doppelganger, that's me, that's me!

subtitles.original: 蝕まれた存在に 世界が気付こうがもう
subtitles.english: Even if the world notices the eroded existence...

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まない 冷め止まない 奇跡の輪廻が狂った
subtitles.english: The never-ending, never-cooling cycle of miracles has gone mad.

subtitles.original: 世界を染め上げるさ 上手くやりやがる
subtitles.english: I'll dye the world! You're doing a good job.

subtitles.original: パッパッパ
subtitles.english: Pa-pa-pa!
